title: Leah's Resource Library
description: Library Resource Pack for all individual MTR Resource Packs by Leah. Sounds, Bogies, Couplers and Seats included in this pack.
body:
Required resource pack for literally ALL of Leah's MTR Resource Packs.
Updates regularly with every pack release.

[Leah's Resource Library+ | Itch.io](https://queen-leah-k.itch.io/leahs-resource-library-plus)

- HSP

- Metro Cammel GTO-VVVF
